_comment: Vercel Hobby plan only allows daily crons. Minute-level scheduling for /api/cron/reminders, /api/cron/escalations and /api/cron/retry is handled by an external pinger (e.g. cron-job.org) sending 'Authorization: Bearer <CRON_SECRET>'. If you upgrade to Vercel Pro, restore the crons block from docs/deployment.md.
